message:
test(db): add storage_root to all DbPoolConfig test constructors

All test files that create DbPoolConfig now set storage_root explicitly
(pointing to a sibling "storage" directory within the test tempdir) to match
the new required field. This prevents tests from accidentally falling through
to Config::from_env() for archive reconciliation, which could interfere with
unrelated mailbox state on the test machine.

Affected test files: diag_hang, diversity_dedup, filter_pagination,
golden_ranking, load_bench, load_concurrency, logging_redaction,
mail_explorer, pool_exhaustion, query_integration, relevance_harness,
schema_migration, search_benchmark, search_conformance_fuzz, search_quality,
search_v3_conformance, stress, sustained_load, timeout_backpressure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,6 +58,7 @@ fn make_pool_with_connections(max: usize, min: usize) -> (DbPool, tempfile::Temp
         .join(format!("load_concurrency_{}.db", unique_suffix()));
     let config = DbPoolConfig {
         database_url: format!("sqlite:///{}", db_path.display()),
+        storage_root: Some(db_path.parent().unwrap().join("storage")),
         max_connections: max,
         min_connections: min,
         acquire_timeout_ms: 60_000,

@@ -129,6 +129,7 @@ fn make_pool() -> (DbPool, tempfile::TempDir) {
 
     let config = DbPoolConfig {
         database_url: format!("sqlite:///{}", db_path.display()),
+        storage_root: Some(db_path.parent().unwrap().join("storage")),
         max_connections: 5,
         min_connections: 1,
         acquire_timeout_ms: 30_000,
